LanguageData.AM_BlockedUndergroundGarageEntrance.desc: An entrance to an underground parking lot. It is blocked off and entirely inaccessible.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_UndergroundGarage.descriptio: A large ramp descending to a dark underground. It seems wide enough for vehicles.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_UndergroundGarage.label: underground parking lot entrance
LanguageData.AM_Exit_Staircase_UndergroundGarage.desc: A large ramp leading to above ground.
